name: Lemon French Toast
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Grated lemon peel (use fresh, please)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare one loaf French bread as directed on the package.
2. Allow it to cool completely and store overnight.
3. Cut into 12 equal slices, about 1 inch thick.
4. In a bowl, beat together flour, sugar, salt, eggs, milk, lemon peel, and lemon extract until well combined.
5. Place bread in batter; allow to soak until saturated.
6. Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat.
7. Cook the slices for each side until golden brown.
8. Serve warm with honey, powdered sugar, jam, or maple syrup.
Note: Store-bought French bread can be used. Day-old bread provides the best texture for the finished product.
